MINI MINUTES FOR APR-02-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, RE: DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. DEFENDANTS FISHER INVESTMENTS, INC., FISHER ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC, AND DOUGLAS ROBERTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS STAYED IN ITS ENTIRETY PENDING ARBITRATION. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Continued To Jan-06-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS FISHER INVESTMENTS, INC., FISHER ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC, and DOUGLAS ROBERTS' Petition To Compel Arbitration.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Fisher Investments, Inc., Fisher Asset Management, LLC, and Douglas Roberts' motion to compel arbitration against all defendants is granted. The case is stayed in its entirety pending arbitration.

See Word Minutes for complete ruling.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to Dept. 301 a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
